# Hecaton

> Hecaton is a fractional platform-engineering studio, principal-led by Jaime Baldó. It helps scaling SaaS teams audit, rescue, and run their cloud platform through two productised engagements: a fixed-scope Platform Audit & Roadmap, and an ongoing Retainer.

Hecaton operates remotely from Spain (CET/CEST) and serves teams worldwide, comfortable working async from US East to APAC. Focus areas: Amazon Web Services (AWS), Infrastructure-as-Code (Terraform), Kubernetes, CI/CD, observability, FinOps and cloud cost reduction, SOC 2 compliance, and incident/outage reduction. Engagements are principal-led — Jaime does the work directly, with no pretend team.

## Pages

- [Home](https://hecaton.tech/): Overview, selected outcomes from a decade of platform work, and engagement teasers.
- [Engagements](https://hecaton.tech/engagements/): The two engagement shapes (Platform Audit & Roadmap, ongoing Retainer), capacity, and FAQs.
- [About](https://hecaton.tech/about/): Jaime Baldó's background, track record, and ways of working.
- [Contact](https://hecaton.tech/contact/): Book a 30-minute intro call or send a message.

## Legal

- [Privacy](https://hecaton.tech/privacy/): GDPR-aligned privacy policy (EU-hosted booking and analytics).
- [Terms](https://hecaton.tech/terms/): Website terms.
